name: Steak Nicola
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons butter in a pan and cook the mushrooms along with the onion and shallot.
2. Add broth, ketchup, and Worcestershire sauce. Cook for 1 minute.
3. Stir crème fraîche with cornstarch and stir into the sauce until thick. Season with salt and pepper. Set aside.
4. Heat oil in another pan.
5. Add butter and cook steaks rare, 1 minute on each side. Remove steaks to individual baking dishes coated with olive oil.
6. Deglaze the pan where the steaks have been cooked with wine.
7. Pour the pan juices over the steaks and top with cream sauce.
8. Bake in a pre-heated 375°F oven for 10 minutes.
9. Surround each steak with potatoes noisettes and serve very hot in the same dish where they were baked.
